title: 200lb Strength Hobby Sport Survival Paracord Rope - Red, 50ft
description:
The ASR Tactical Kevlar Cord is ideal for your survival kit. Made from 3 strands of Kevlar thread, it has a breaking strength of 200 lbs. This cord is coated in pvc, for extreme weather conditions and UV protection. All cords are flame-resistant. Weighing less than a few ounces, the Kevlar survival cord is optimal for traps, bows, and snares. This cord is a perfect addition to any emergency kit. Made in the USA.

200lb Strength Hobby Sport Survival Paracord Rope - Red, 50ft

The ASR Tactical Kevlar Cord is ideal for your survival kit. Made from 3 strands of Kevlar thread, it has a breaking strength of 200 lbs. This cord is coated in pvc, for extreme weather conditions and UV protection. All cords are flame-resistant.

Key Features

  • Breaking strength: 200 lbs
  • Diameter: .03" (VERY THIN- CONSTRUCTED FROM 3 STRANDS OF THREAD)
  • Color: Red
  • Length: 25 feet
  • Flame & Weather Resistant

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KSC-25-45-817
  • UPC: 100776748660
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 50 ft

Weighing less than a few ounces, the Kevlar survival cord is optimal for traps, bows, and snares. This cord is a perfect addition to any emergency kit. Made in the USA.
